title: EverythingX finite operator basis
principle: The basis is finite; concrete typed and parameterized operator instances are open-ended and generated from FormatVariant, ObjectIR, invariants and relations.

operator_instance.form: Operator(kind, input_type_expr, output_type_expr, parameters, preconditions, invariants, effects, loss, cost, evidence)

bytes plus encoding, compression, encryption and error-correction transforms
typed chunks, boxes, members, offsets, references and payload streams
ordered values
records and fields
rows, columns, types and nullability
relations, keys, constraints and indexes
hierarchical nodes
nodes and edges
typed n-dimensional dense or sparse arrays
identity-bearing typed objects and references
ordered events and clocks
time-addressed tracks, samples, events and synchronization
spatial objects, geometry, transforms, appearance and cameras
members, relationships and package rules
names, directories, metadata, links and allocation

flow, pages, styles, resources, annotations and reading order
pixel grid, channels, color space and metadata
paths, shapes, paint, text and transforms
sample frames, channels, rate, sample representation and channel layout
notes, controls, tempo, instruments and timed performance events
synchronized audio, video, text and metadata tracks
timed text, styling and accessibility semantics
glyphs, outlines, metrics, variation and shaping tables
features, rasters, coordinates, CRS and topology

versioned domain ontology, units, constraints and provenance

families.purpose: Create knowledge about an artifact without claiming a representation change.
Change or discover L0 boundaries and materialization.
Apply or remove reversible or lossy L1 byte/signal coding.
Operate on L2 syntax, containers and part-whole relations.
Transform L3 models while stating structural invariants.
Move within or across L4 semantic spaces.
Operate on sampled, framed or event time axes.
Transform or observe L5 executable and evaluable meaning.
Construct information not deterministically present in the source.
Apply L6 domain semantics, policy and history.

closure_rules: Every concrete operator binds input and output type expressions, never extensions alone.
Every part operation names container_of, embeds, packages, references or has_logical_component.
Every cross-IR operator declares whether it is convert, render, project or infer.
Every n-ary operator declares ordering, identity, associativity and conflict behavior when those concepts exist.
Every candidate receives a computability review before implementation priority is assigned.
Negative reviews remain first-class backlog records instead of being deleted.
